Metadata.SiteTitle: Pico Outfitters | Retail search powered by PicoStack
Metadata.SiteDescription: A JSON-CMS driven retail demo using PicoWAL, PicoWeb, PicoWAL Retail Primitives and BareMetalJsTools.

Pages.MarkdownContent: Search across outdoor kit, food, sportswear, drinks and hardware. Add products to a demo cart and complete a sample checkout.
Pages.InlineHTMLContent: Search, cart and checkout are backed by PicoWAL cards and PicoWAL Search indexes.

Hero.Title: A tiny CMS-driven store on the Pico stack.
Hero.Subtitle: The copy, menu, departments and checkout hints are served from a SimpleCMS-shaped JSON document. Products and indexes live in PicoWAL.
Hero.SearchPlaceholder: Try coffee drinks, hardware drill, sportswear, granola...

Sections.Title: Fast product discovery
Sections.Text: Full-text, vector candidates, facets and range indexes are composed from PicoWAL primitives.

Sections.Title: Demo checkout
Sections.Text: Cart, customer, shipping, payment and promotion APIs are included for a complete store walkthrough.

Pages.MarkdownContent: Review the cart, choose a customer, select shipping and place a demo order.
Pages.InlineHTMLContent: No payment details are collected; payment methods are sample data.

Pages.MarkdownContent: The demo exposes JSON sample APIs for catalog, customers, promotions, shipping and payment methods.
Pages.InlineHTMLContent: Use these endpoints to show the CMS and commerce API surfaces separately.
